title: Composite Items
description: A form or version of an composite item that differs in some respect from other forms of the same or from a standard. You can create your composite items by associating multiple items and their respective quantities.

name.example: Combo of Apple IPhone and Smartwatch

composite_item_name.example: Combo of Apple IPhone and Smartwatch

sku.description: Stock Keeping Unit value of the item. It should be unique throughout the product

composite_item_sku.description: Stock Keeping Unit value of the composite item. It should be unique throughout the product

composite_item_id.description: Unique ID generated for the composite item by the server. This is used as identifier

bundle_id.description: Unique ID generated for the Assemblies by the server. This is used as identifier

item_id.description: Unique ID generated by the server for the Item. This is used as an identifier.

pricebook_rate.description: Price list applied on the item's selling price.

initial_stock_rate.description: Average purchase price of initial stock. This is required for FIFO cost lot tracking and inventory valuation

upc.description: Unique Product Code, 12 digit unique code of the item

ean.description: European Article Number, 13 digit barcode number of the item

isbn.description: International Standard Book Number, 13 digit unique commercial book identifier barcode of the item

part_number.description: MPN - Manufacturing Part Number, unambiguously identifies a part design

is_combo_product.description: Defines whether the item is composite or not true for composite items

is_taxable.description: To check if the item is taxable or not true if the item is taxable, else false

vendor_id.description: Unique ID generated by the server for preferred vendor to buy this composite item

line_items.description: A assemblies can contain multiple line items. Each line item contains item_id,name,description,quantity_consumed,unit,account_id,location_id.

item_order.description: Sort order of the line item.

line_item_id.description: Unique ID generated by the server for mapping the associated item with composite item

quantity.description: Quantity of item associated with the composite item

quantity_to_bundle.description: Quantity of Assembly to be Assembled.

quantity_consumed.description: Quantity of item to be Assembled.

tax_id.description: Unique ID generated by the server for the tax .

tax_name.description: Name of the tax applied on selling this item

tax_percentage.description: Percentage at which the item is taxed

tax_type.description: Type of tax. It can either Tax or Group Tax

customfield_id.description: Unique ID generated by the server for the custom field.

custom_fields.description: Custom fields are used to add more information about the item

date.description: The date on which Assemblies is done

per_page.description: Items to be displayed per page

sort_column.description: column to be used for sorting. Allowed values: name,sku,rate,tax_name,purchase_rate,created_time,last_modified_time,reorder_level

filter_by.description: Filter items by status. Allowed values: Status.All,Status.Active,Inactive,Lowstock

usestate.description: Whether current filter needs to be saved

available_stock.description: Stock based on Shipments and Receives

actual_available_stock.description: Stock based on Shipments and Receives minus ordered stock

purchase_account_id.description: Unique ID generated by the server for the type of purchase

purchase_account_name.description: Type of purchase under which the composite item was bought

account_id.description: Unique ID generated by the server for the type of sale of this item

account_name.description: Type of sale under which the composite item is sold

inventory_account_id.description: Unique ID generated by the server for the type of inventory for this item

stock_on_hand.description: Stock based on Invoices and Bills

asset_value.description: value of the composite items based on purchase rate

image_id.description: Unique identifier generated by the server for item image

image_type.description: Type of the image Only images with gif,png,jpeg,jpg,bmp extensions are allowed

mapped_items.description: Items that are associated with the composite item

item_order.description: Sort order of the mapped item.

created_time.description: Time at which the contact was created.

last_modified_time.description: Search using the Last Modified Time of the Base Currency Adjustment

tax_specification.description: Type of tax. It can be intra or inter

item_tax_preferences.description: List of tax preferences of the item

is_completed.description: Denotes the status of the assemblies. Currently, this has to be true since we didnt support any other status as of now.

combo_type.description: Type of composite item. Allowed values: assembly, kit.

brand.description: Brand name of the composite item.

mapped_items.description: Items that are associated with the composite item

item_order.description: Sort order of the mapped item.

label_rate.description: Label rate (MRP) of the composite item.

tax_exemption_id.description: Unique identifier of the tax exemption.

brand.description: Brand name of the composite item.

alias_name.description: Alias name for the composite item.

can_be_sold.description: Whether the composite item can be sold.

can_be_purchased.description: Whether the composite item can be purchased.

is_returnable.description: Whether the composite item is returnable.

minimum_order_quantity.description: Minimum order quantity for the composite item.

maximum_order_quantity.description: Maximum order quantity for the composite item.

track_serial_number.description: Whether serial number tracking is enabled for the composite item.

track_batch_number.description: Whether batch number tracking is enabled for the composite item.

package_details.description: Package details of the composite item.

tags.description: Tags associated with the composite item (reporting tags).

tag_option_id.description: Unique identifier of the tag option.

combo_type.description: Type of composite item. Allowed values: assembly, kit.

brand.description: Brand name of the composite item.

combo_type.description: Type of composite item. Allowed values: assembly, kit.

brand.description: Brand name of the composite item.

alias_name.description: Alias name for the composite item.

assembly_type.description: Assembly type of the composite item.

label_rate.description: Label rate (MRP) of the composite item.

sales_rate.description: Selling rate of the composite item.

can_be_sold.description: Whether the composite item can be sold.

can_be_purchased.description: Whether the composite item can be purchased.

track_inventory.description: Whether inventory tracking is enabled for the composite item.

is_returnable.description: Whether the composite item is returnable.

tax_exemption_id.description: Unique identifier of the tax exemption.

minimum_order_quantity.description: Minimum order quantity for the composite item.

maximum_order_quantity.description: Maximum order quantity for the composite item.

available_for_sale_stock.description: Stock available for sale after deducting committed stock.

track_serial_number.description: Whether serial number tracking is enabled for the composite item.

track_batch_number.description: Whether batch number tracking is enabled for the composite item.

is_linked_with_zohocrm.description: Whether the composite item is linked with Zoho CRM.

package_details.description: Package details of the composite item.

tags.description: Tags associated with the composite item (reporting tags).

tag_option_id.description: Unique identifier of the tag option.

combo_type.description: Type of composite item. Allowed values: assembly, kit.

message.example: Re-activation complete! The item is back in business!
The item has been marked as inactive.

serial_numbers.description: Serial numbers for the line item. Applicable only for items with serial tracking enabled.

batches.description: Batch details for the line item. Reference an existing batch using batch_id. Applicable only for items with batch tracking enabled.

batch_id.description: Unique identifier of an existing batch.

storages.description: Bin/storage locations from which stock was consumed for this batch.

storage_id.description: Unique identifier of the bin/storage location.

storages.description: Bin/storage locations consumed for the line item. Applicable only for items with bin tracking enabled.

storage_id.description: Unique identifier of the bin/storage location.

serial_numbers.description: Serial numbers consumed from this bin.

finished_product_serial_numbers.description: Serial numbers to be assigned to the finished product. Use when the composite item has serial tracking enabled.

finished_product_batches.description: Batches to be created for the finished product. Use when the composite item has batch tracking enabled.

batch_number.description: Batch number for the new finished product batch.

external_batch_number.description: External batch number from the manufacturer.

storages.description: Bin/storage locations allocated for the finished product batch.

storage_id.description: Unique identifier of the bin/storage location.

finished_product_storages.description: Bin/storage locations to store the finished product. Use when the composite item has bin tracking enabled.

storage_id.description: Unique identifier of the bin/storage location.

serial_numbers.description: Serial numbers allocated to this bin for the finished product.

status.description: Status of the assembly. Allowed values: draft, confirmed, bundled.

line_items.description: A assemblies can contain multiple line items. Each line item contains item_id,name,description,quantity_consumed,unit,account_id,location_id.

total_quantity_consumed.description: Total quantity consumed for this component.

warehouse_id.description: Warehouse ID for the component item.

item_order.description: Sort order of the line item.

warehouse_id.description: Warehouse ID associated with the assembly.

warehouse_name.description: Warehouse name associated with the assembly.

warehouse_id.description: Warehouse ID associated with the assembly.

warehouse_name.description: Warehouse name associated with the assembly.

created_by_id.description: Unique identifier of the user who created the assembly.

warehouse_id.description: Warehouse ID associated with the assembly.

warehouse_name.description: Warehouse name associated with the assembly.

project_id.description: Unique identifier of the associated project.

created_by_id.description: Unique identifier of the user who created the assembly.

The composite item image has been deleted.
